item.title: A message from Ms. Montgomery:
item.description: Varsity Boys baseball tryout sign up is posted outside of my office in the library. Tryout dates will be posted soon. All students trying out must hand in their participation forms PRIOR to the first tryout.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Attention all volleyball tournament teams - Just a reminder that our CrossFit fundraiser volleyball tournament begins TODAY at lunch. Games will run from 10:50 to 11:25, and all teams must be ready to play at their scheduled time. Some teams will be playing twice, so please check the schedule carefully. All players have been added to a Teams group chat — please make sure you read the message from Mrs. Longval, as it includes the full schedule and important information. Good luck to all teams, and let’s have some fun while supporting our CrossFit athletes!

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval :
item.description: The weight room will be closed today, Wednesday, and Friday at lunch due to the volleyball tournament taking place in the gym. Thank you for your understanding, and good luck to all teams participating!

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval :
item.description: Attention all varsity track and field athletes, There will be practice today after school. Please meet in the atrium/cafeteria at 2:20pm

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval :
item.description: Attention CrossFit team members, There will be practice today from 2:20 to 3:00 PM. One more week to go before our competition - lets go RAVENS!

item.title: A message from Mr. Warner:
item.description: A huge shout out the Grade 7 - 8 Girls' Basketball team for their tournament yesterday in Kemptville. The girls showed incredible resilience, toughness, and sportsmanship while playing 4 consecutive games without a break! Even though they eventually fell to North Grenville in overtime in the semi-finals, the coaches could not be more proud of their efforts. Please congratulate the girls STA - they represented with true Raven spirit!
